text_blocks.text: Some of his friends provided
music at his request; among them, Potocka
sang and Franchomme played the cello.
Chopin requested that his body be opened
after death (for fear of being buried alive)
and his heart returned to Warsaw where it
rests at the Church of the Holy Cross. He
also bequeathed his unfinished notes on a
piano tuition method, Projet de methode, to
Alkan for completion. On 17 October, after
midnight, the physician leaned over him and
asked whether he was suffering greatly. "No
longer", he replied. He died a few minutes
before two o'clock in the morning. Those
present at the deathbed appear to have
included his sister Ludwika, Princess
Marcelona Czartoryska, Sand's daughter
Solange, and his close friend Thomas
Albrecht. Later that morning, Solange's
husband Clesinger made Chopin's death mask
and a cast of his left hand.
